creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 237342
Patch for olm

Use USE_GITLAB to follow Porters Handbook more closely and be consistent with ports tree
Disable building of unit tests

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)
